message:
feat(python): numpy.testing.assert_allclose wrapper parity (franken_numpy-kxkp)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.testing.assert_allclose
covering rtol, atol, equal_nan, err_msg, and verbose. Exposed as
testing_assert_allclose. Test covers identical (passes), within-tol
(passes), beyond-tol (raises AssertionError of correct type), NaN
with equal_nan=True passing and equal_nan=False raising, custom
err_msg appearing in raised text, and scalar/array broadcasting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
